articles.title: Donald Trump Tries to Troll Taylor Swift on Her Wedding Night, But She Parties on - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The specter of a wedding on a holiday he seeks to own seemed to irk the president, or at least the staff manning the White House Instagram feed.
articles.content:
Sandler hosted, Trump roasted.
The White House went into Taylor Swift overdrive on Friday, posting a meme appropriating the Swift-Travis Kelce wedding at Madison Square Garden.
